name: Salvianolic acid B
summary: Salvianolic acid B is a Salvia miltiorrhiza phenolic acid with mechanistic literature for endothelial and antioxidant pathways, limited by low oral bioavailability.
description: Salvianolic acid B is a Salvia miltiorrhiza phenolic acid with mechanistic literature for endothelial and antioxidant pathways, limited by low oral bioavailability.
safetyNotes: Interaction potential should be interpreted conservatively in cardiovascular and anticoagulant contexts.
